business_ideas.idea: Cloud bakeries: Instagram-based drops of specialty baked goods selling out instantly.
Make side ingredient the main product (cookie dough, cereal bars, whipped cream).
Viral food by changing colors of normal products (rainbow bagels, cloud bread).
Oversized or miniature versions of foods for novelty appeal and photos.
Mashup foods combining two unlikely items (cronut, sushi burrito, ramen burger).
Fancy/upscale versions of cheap foods (gourmet tater tots, mozzarella sticks).
Revival of Eat This Not That as Instagram account with nutrition comparisons.
Tiller Money: Google Sheets plugin for automatic bank import and tracking.
Salary transparency database for any industry beyond tech (medical, consulting).

predictions.text: Cloud bakeries will be acquired by PE firms and moved into retail channels.
Next Ben & Jerry's or Mrs. Fields will emerge from Instagram food brands.
Food virality will shift more towards TikTok-native formats in coming years.
